_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: Nirogacestat and mirdametinib were synergistic in MPNST cell lines
details: Nirogacestat and mirdametinib were synergistic in MPNST cell lines with combination index values less than 1
